jobDescription:
Software Engineering Intern — Nexus Labs

About the role
Nexus Labs is hiring a Software Engineering Intern to help build and ship product features across our web platform. You'll work with experienced engineers on real tickets, code reviews, and weekly demos.

Responsibilities
- Build and maintain backend APIs and frontend features
- Write clean, tested code in collaboration with the team
- Participate in design discussions and code reviews
- Debug issues and improve developer tooling where needed

Requirements
- Currently pursuing a degree in Computer Science or related field
- Experience with at least one of: Python, Java, or JavaScript/TypeScript
- Familiarity with web frameworks (e.g. React, Flask, FastAPI) and relational databases
- Comfortable using Git and collaborating on a shared codebase
- Strong written communication and eagerness to learn

Nice to have
- Docker, PostgreSQL, REST API design
- Prior project or research experience shipping software end-to-end
